results.title: BCMC Board Gathers for May Meeting
results.description: WARREN, Ark. – The Bradley County Medical Center Board of Directors met for its monthly meeting on Thursday, May 28 inside the hospital’s conference room with improved volumes, financial reports, executive updates, purchases out of sales tax funds, and annual policy approvals among the topics on the agenda. results.title: Traction Uranium Announces Filing of NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Aurora Uranium Project, Saskatchewan
results.description: CALGARY, Alberta, June 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Traction Uranium Corp. (CSE: TRAC) (OTC: TRCTF) (FRA: Z1K) (the “ Company ” or “ Traction ”) is pleased to announce that it has filed an independent technical report for the Aurora Uranium Project (“Aurora” or the “Project”), located in Saskatchewan’s Athabasca Basin region, under the Company’s profile on SEDAR+. The technical report, titled “Technical Report on the Aurora Property, Athabasca Basin, Saskatchewan, Canada”, is dated June 1, 2026, with an effective date of May 21, 2026 (the “Technical Report”) and was prepared in accordance with National Instrument 43-101 – Standards of Disclosure for Mineral Projects (“NI 43-101”).
